paragraphs: I芒聙聶m Barbara Soriano, a brand and graphic designer based in Buenos Aires, Argentina, with over 15 years of experience helping churches and Christian organizations communicate with clarity through branding, editorial, print, and digital design.

My design journey began in my local church, where I discovered how thoughtful design can support ministry. Since then, I芒聙聶ve worked with churches across the United States and Latin America, creating sermon series, event identities, books, discipleship resources, membership guides, and complete church rebrands.

For three years I was part of the Church Media Squad team, producing weekly creative content for U.S. churches. I芒聙聶ve also worked with e625 for more than a decade, designing books, Bibles, curricula, and digital resources for ministries in over 20 countries. I don芒聙聶t just design for churches芒聙聰I understand how they work.

testimonials.quote: 芒聙聹Barbara consistently delivered thoughtful, high-quality design under tight deadlines. She quickly understood the needs of each church we served and created work that was both strategic and visually compelling. She芒聙聶s reliable, collaborative, and a joy to work with.芒聙聺
